body_text:
23:13 â June 20, 2023
CRA Business Taxes Update
We incorporated procedures from the Business Taxes User Guide, Form 5915, into the CRA Business Taxes Part. We reviewed all the information for accuracy, reorganized chapters for a smoother flow, made minor text changes, and updated images and related procedures with current formatting standards.
Bill Payments Volume
CRA Business Taxes Part
Section 1.4, Contact and Websites
We added information for contacting CRA about cases of bad actors, identity theft, or suspected fraudulently obtained CRA payments.
Section 1.5, CRA Business Taxes Document Library
We removed Business Taxes User Guide, Form 5915.
Chapter 3, Legal and Policy Considerations for Business Taxes
We combined legal and policy information into one chapter.
Chapter 4, Workflow Options for Business Taxes
We moved this chapter and renamed it (previously called âInternal Workflowsâ).
Chapter 6, Examining Remittance Vouchers
We moved this chapter and renamed it (previously called âIdentifying Remittance Vouchers for Electronic Processingâ).
Chapter 9, Reversing CRA Business Tax Payments
We replaced images of the Bill Payment Reversal Request with current versions and reformatted procedures.
Chapter 10, Processing Remittance Vouchers Manually
We moved this information into its own chapter.
